sentence: 那位高僧被皇帝封为国师。
pinyin: Nà wèi gāo sēng bèi huáng dì fēng wéi guó shī.
english: That eminent monk was appointed as the emperor's national teacher.

meaning: three-year college; junior college; professional training college
sentence: 她读的是大专，毕业后直接工作了。
pinyin: Tā dú de shì dà zhuān, bì yè hòu zhí jiē gōng zuò le.
english: She attended a junior college and went straight to work after graduating.

sentence: 他是著名的翻译家，翻了几十本书。
pinyin: Tā shì zhù míng de fān yì jiā, fān le jǐ shí běn shū.
english: He is a well-known translator who has translated dozens of books.

meaning: to cut staff; to lay off employees
sentence: 公司因为效益不好开始裁员了。
pinyin: Gōng sī yīn wèi xiào yì bù hǎo kāi shǐ cái yuán le.
english: The company started laying off staff due to poor performance.

meaning: state-owned enterprise; (Tw) international business management (as a s
sentence: 他在国企工作，福利待遇很好。
pinyin: Tā zài guó qǐ gōng zuò, fú lì dài yù hěn hǎo.
english: He works at a state-owned enterprise, which offers great benefits.
